subject: current-affairs
description: World Organizations & Headquarters MCQs for PPSC, FPSC, NTS, CSS & PMS.

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of the International Labour Organization (ILO)?
mcqs.explanation: ILO is headquartered in Geneva, Switzerland.

mcqs.q: In which year was the International Labour Organization (ILO) established?
mcqs.explanation: ILO was established in 1919 under the Treaty of Versailles.

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of the International Atomic Energy Agency (IAEA)?
mcqs.explanation: IAEA is headquartered in Vienna, Austria.

mcqs.q: In which year was the IAEA established?
mcqs.explanation: IAEA was established in 1957.

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of the United Nations Organization (UNO)?
mcqs.explanation: The UN headquarters is in New York City, USA.

mcqs.q: On which date was the UNO formally established?
mcqs.explanation: The UN officially came into existence on 24 October 1945.

mcqs.q: Where was the headquarters of the League of Nations?
mcqs.explanation: The League of Nations was headquartered in Geneva, Switzerland.

mcqs.q: When was the League of Nations established?
mcqs.explanation: The League of Nations came into being on 10 January 1920.

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of the Commonwealth of Nations?
mcqs.explanation: The Commonwealth Secretariat is headquartered in London, United Kingdom.

mcqs.q: In which year was the Commonwealth of Nations formed?
mcqs.explanation: The Commonwealth of Nations was effectively formed in 1931 (Statute of Westminster).

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of the European Union (EU)?
mcqs.explanation: The principal seat of the EU is Brussels (with Strasbourg and Luxembourg also hosting EU institutions).

mcqs.q: In which year was the European Economic Community (later European Union) established?
mcqs.explanation: The EEC was established by the Treaty of Rome in 1957.

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of SAARC?
mcqs.explanation: SAARC is headquartered in Kathmandu, Nepal.

mcqs.q: When was SAARC formed?
mcqs.explanation: SAARC was formed in Dhaka on 8 December 1985.

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of ASEAN?
mcqs.explanation: ASEAN is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

mcqs.q: When was ASEAN established?
mcqs.explanation: ASEAN was established on 9 August 1967 with the Bangkok Declaration.

mcqs.q: Where was the Regional Cooperation for Development (RCD) headquartered?
mcqs.explanation: RCD (founded by Iran, Pakistan and Turkey in 1964) was headquartered in Tehran.

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of the Economic Cooperation Organization (ECO)?
mcqs.explanation: ECO is headquartered in Tehran, Iran.

mcqs.q: When was ECO established (in its current form)?
mcqs.explanation: ECO was established in 1985 by Pakistan, Iran and Turkey, succeeding RCD.

mcqs.q: In which month and year was the 'Shanghai Five' (predecessor of the SCO) founded?
mcqs.explanation: The 'Shanghai Five' was founded in April 1996; the SCO itself was formed in June 2001.

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of OPEC?
mcqs.explanation: OPEC is headquartered in Vienna, Austria.

mcqs.q: In which year was OPEC founded?
mcqs.explanation: OPEC was founded in September 1960 (with formal headquarters established later).

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of the Colombo Plan?
mcqs.explanation: The Colombo Plan is headquartered in Colombo, Sri Lanka.

mcqs.q: When was the Colombo Plan founded?
mcqs.explanation: The Colombo Plan was founded in 1950.

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of the Organisation of Islamic Cooperation (OIC)?
mcqs.explanation: The OIC is headquartered in Jeddah, Saudi Arabia.

mcqs.q: In which month and year was the OIC established?
mcqs.explanation: The OIC was established in September 1969 after the Al-Aqsa fire.

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of Amnesty International?
mcqs.explanation: Amnesty International is headquartered in London, United Kingdom.

mcqs.q: When was Amnesty International founded?
mcqs.explanation: Amnesty International was founded by Peter Benenson in 1961.

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of Transparency International?
mcqs.explanation: Transparency International is headquartered in Berlin, Germany.

mcqs.q: When was Transparency International founded?
mcqs.explanation: Transparency International was founded in May 1993.

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of the International Committee of the Red Cross (ICRC)?
mcqs.explanation: ICRC is headquartered in Geneva, Switzerland.

mcqs.q: When was the ICRC established by Jean Henri Dunant?
mcqs.explanation: Jean Henri Dunant founded the ICRC in Geneva in 1864.

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of the World Trade Organization (WTO)?
mcqs.explanation: WTO is headquartered in Geneva, Switzerland.

mcqs.q: When did the WTO come into effect?
mcqs.explanation: WTO came into effect on 1 January 1995, replacing GATT.

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of the Asian Development Bank (ADB)?
mcqs.explanation: The ADB is headquartered in Manila, the Philippines.

mcqs.q: When was the Asian Development Bank established?
mcqs.explanation: The ADB was formally established in 1966.

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of the Arab League?
mcqs.explanation: The Arab League is headquartered in Cairo, Egypt.

mcqs.q: When was the Arab League established?
mcqs.explanation: The Arab League was established on 22 March 1945.

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of NATO?
mcqs.explanation: NATO is headquartered in Brussels, Belgium.

mcqs.q: When was NATO established?
mcqs.explanation: NATO was established by the North Atlantic Treaty signed on 4 April 1949.

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of INTERPOL?
mcqs.explanation: INTERPOL is headquartered in Lyon, France.

mcqs.q: In which year was the International Criminal Police Organization (INTERPOL) established?
mcqs.explanation: INTERPOL was established in 1923.

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of the Commonwealth of Independent States (CIS)?
mcqs.explanation: CIS is headquartered in Minsk, Belarus.

mcqs.q: When was the CIS established?
mcqs.explanation: The CIS was established on 8 December 1991 with the Belavezha Accords.

mcqs.q: Where is the seat of the African Union (formerly Organisation of African Unity)?
mcqs.explanation: The seat of the OAU/AU is in Addis Ababa, Ethiopia.

mcqs.q: When was the Organisation of African Unity (OAU) established?
mcqs.explanation: The OAU was established on 25 May 1963 in Addis Ababa.

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of the Food and Agriculture Organization (FAO)?
mcqs.explanation: FAO is headquartered in Rome, Italy.

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of UNESCO?
mcqs.explanation: UNESCO is headquartered in Paris, France.

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of the World Health Organization (WHO)?
mcqs.explanation: WHO is headquartered in Geneva, Switzerland.

mcqs.q: In which year was the WHO established?
mcqs.explanation: The WHO was established in 1948.

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of the International Bank for Reconstruction and Development (World Bank)?
mcqs.explanation: The World Bank (IBRD) is headquartered in Washington, D.C., USA.

mcqs.q: When was the World Bank (IBRD) established?
mcqs.explanation: The IBRD was established at the 1944 Bretton Woods Conference.

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of the World Meteorological Organization (WMO)?
mcqs.explanation: WMO is headquartered in Geneva, Switzerland.

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of the International Maritime Organization (IMO)?
mcqs.explanation: IMO (formerly IMCO, established 1958) is headquartered in London.

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of UNICEF?
mcqs.explanation: UNICEF is headquartered in New York, USA.

mcqs.q: When was UNICEF established?
mcqs.explanation: UNICEF was established on 11 December 1946.

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of UNDP (United Nations Development Programme)?
mcqs.explanation: UNDP is headquartered in New York, USA.

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of UNEP?
mcqs.explanation: UNEP is headquartered in Nairobi, Kenya.

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of UNHCR (UN High Commissioner for Refugees)?
mcqs.explanation: UNHCR is headquartered in Geneva, Switzerland.

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of UNIDO (UN Industrial Development Organization)?
mcqs.explanation: UNIDO is headquartered in Vienna, Austria.

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of the IMF (International Monetary Fund)?
mcqs.explanation: The IMF is headquartered in Washington, D.C., USA.

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of ICAO (International Civil Aviation Organization)?
mcqs.explanation: ICAO is headquartered in Montreal, Canada.

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of the Universal Postal Union (UPU)?
mcqs.explanation: UPU is headquartered in Bern, Switzerland.

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of the International Telecommunication Union (ITU)?
mcqs.explanation: ITU is headquartered in Geneva, Switzerland.

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of IFAD (International Fund for Agricultural Development)?
mcqs.explanation: IFAD is headquartered in Rome, Italy.

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of UNCTAD?
mcqs.explanation: UNCTAD is headquartered in Geneva, Switzerland.

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of UNITAR (UN Institute for Training and Research)?
mcqs.explanation: UNITAR is headquartered in New York, USA.

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of UNRWA (UN Relief and Works Agency for Palestine Refugees)?
mcqs.explanation: As per the original source bank, UNRWA's HQ is recorded here as New York. (Note: UNRWA actually maintains operational HQs in Amman and Gaza; the source attribution has been preserved.)

mcqs.q: Where is the headquarters of UNFPA (UN Population Fund)?
mcqs.explanation: UNFPA is headquartered in New York, USA.
